label: Webhook
description: Starts the flow when the webhook URL receives an HTTP request (JSON, form, or binary body).

parameter_schema.title: Webhook
parameter_schema.description: URL path segment routing on this DocRouter webhook is keyed by webhook id (the production URL `/v0/webhooks/{webhook_id}`). Treat `path` as a human label aligned with comparable tools; enforced HTTP verbs and security options mirror that pattern.

webhook_leaf.title: Path
webhook_leaf.description: Public URL leaf for both production and test endpoints. Should be a UUID; must be unique across the entire system.

http_method.title: HTTP method
http_method.description: Single verb when multiple HTTP methods are off.

allowed_methods.title: Allowed methods
allowed_methods.description: Comma-separated list (e.g. "GET, POST"). Leave empty while multiple-methods mode is on to allow every verb the gateway accepts.

response_mode.title: Respond
response_mode.description: Respond immediately: return an HTTP acknowledgement right away and queue the workflow. When last node finishes: await a synchronous run (server time limit applies) and return JSON from the last executed node's first output item (or a minimal execution envelope). Using Respond to Webhook: same synchronous run; the HTTP reply is produced by the Respond to Webhook node, or the default acknowledgement if that node does not run.

response_code.title: Response status code
response_code.description: HTTP status returned with the acknowledgement when responding immediately.

response_data.title: Response data
response_data.description: Custom acknowledgement payload (JSON string or plain text). Empty restores the default `{ "execution_id": "…" }` JSON envelope.

response_content_type.title: Response content type
response_content_type.description: Optional Content-Type for the acknowledgement (derived when empty).

response_headers.title: Response headers
response_headers.description: Optional headers added to the synchronous acknowledgement.

ignore_bots.title: Ignore bots
ignore_bots.description: Reject heuristic bot / crawler traffic with HTTP 403 before enqueueing a run.

ip_whitelist.title: IP whitelist
ip_whitelist.description: Comma-separated allow rules: each entry is a single IPv4/IPv6 address (exact match) or a CIDR network (e.g. 10.0.0.0/8). Only the TCP client IP is checked unless the deployment sets env FLOW_WEBHOOK_TRUST_X_FORWARDED_FOR for trusted reverse-proxy chains (then X-Forwarded-For is used).

raw_body.title: Raw body
raw_body.description: For non-multipart requests, stash the uploaded bytes under the webhook binary field instead of JSON/text parsing.

binary_property_name.title: Binary property name
binary_property_name.description: Output binary field/prefix used when multipart files or raw body uploads attach to GridFS.
